briefdescription.para: Get the number of tables handled by SocketStreamer.

detaileddescription.para: @Synopsis Connect to a client. If already connected to one, then do not make any more connections.

briefdescription.para: This function is called at its clock tick.

detaileddescription.para: Dest functions. The process function called by scheduler on every tick

briefdescription.para: Reinit. We make sure it is non-blocking.

detaileddescription.para: The reinit function called by scheduler for the reset

briefdescription.para: Remove multiple tables if found from SocketStreamer.

detaileddescription.para: @Returns True of success, false otherwise. It is callee job to clean up data_ on a successful return from this function.
